name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers between 8pm and 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 4am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy, with a low around 62. Southeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
